full_text: I'm gonna hit for sure, uh-oh. Oh my goodness. It's getting a little scary, down throw, up air, okay. I don't know, obviously not enough to take just yet, but it's getting a little scary right now for both sides. Okay, Spargo desperately trying to get back to the center stage, but taking his time, gets the grab. Gonna charge up the limit about halfway here. This is a really good opportunity for zackray, but every single grab, even if it's not too much damage, Spargo's getting all this limit charge here. So the next offstage interaction might not even come. The back air connects, Spargo closing out game number two. Oh man, I know he had the lead.

corrections.original: I know he had the beat
corrections.corrected: I know he had the lead
